recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: The Dazzled
recommendations.overview: Camille, is the eldest of a large family. One day, her parents enter a religious community which gradually, regimentation becomes sectarian and Camille will have to fight to assert her freedom and save her brothers and sisters.

recommendations.title: Same Old Song
recommendations.overview: Business executive Odile seeks a new, larger apartment. Her younger sister Camille, having completed her doctoral thesis in history, is a Paris tour guide. Simon is a regular on Camille's tours as he's attracted to her. However, Camille has fallen fo

recommendations.title: Cyrano de Bergerac
recommendations.overview: Famed swordsman and poet Cyrano de Bergerac is in love with his cousin Roxane. He has never expressed his love for her as he his large nose undermines his self-confidence. Then he finds a way to express his love to her, indirectly.

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.

recommendations.title: Indochine
recommendations.overview: In colonial Vietnam, dashing French naval captain Jean-Baptiste, wealthy plantation owner Éliane Devries, and her adopted Vietnamese daughter Camillevare the three points of a cross-cultural romantic triangle. As the struggle against European imperia

recommendations.title: Hunting & Gathering
recommendations.overview: When Camille falls ill, she is forced to live with Philibert and Franck.

recommendations.title: The Blue Caftan
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged tailor and his wife find their relationship challenged by the arrival of a handsome new apprentice.

recommendations.title: The Ideal Palace
recommendations.overview: Follows Joseph Ferdinand Chavel a French postman who built a palace in the French countryside over 33 years.

recommendations.title: Today's Special
recommendations.overview: Young Manhattan chef Samir rediscovers his heritage and passion for life through the enchanting art of cooking Indian food.
